# Rooted Legacy

> Marketing + community platform for an Indianapolis urban farm. Booking (RSVP), produce farm stand (read-only), recipes, history, weather, vendor + contact forms, admin dashboard, vendor directory, About page, and featured-event treatment (Soothing Sundays).

## Project Overview

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 16 (App Router, React 19) ¬∑ TypeScript ¬∑ Tailwind CSS v4 ¬∑ Supabase (Postgres + Auth (email+password) + Storage) ¬∑ Resend (custom SMTP) ¬∑ Google Sheets API ¬∑ OpenWeather ¬∑ MDX (next-mdx-remote) ¬∑ Vercel hosting
**Status:** Live in production at https://rootedlegacyfarm.com. Auth + admin CRUD (events, team) shipped; Phase 2 payments pending
**Purpose:** Public site + lightweight backoffice for a Black-led urban farm and its partners (Bodi Buzz, Cre8tive Alignment Network, Pure-trition). Single developer maintains.

## Core Documentation

- `README.md` ‚Äî Setup
- `docs/SETUP.md` ‚Äî Provisioning Supabase, Resend, Google Sheets
- `CODE_MAP.md` ‚Äî Feature-to-file map
- `ENTRY_POINTS.md` ‚Äî Routes, scripts, middleware, server actions
- `DATA_FLOW.md` ‚Äî System-level data movement
- `IMPORT_GRAPH_SUMMARY.md` ‚Äî Core modules + server/client boundaries
- `FEATURE_BOUNDARIES.md` ‚Äî Component ownership
- `docs/ai/memory.md` ‚Äî Project history + current state
- `docs/ai/roadmap.md` ‚Äî Phase 1 / 2 / 3 plan
- `docs/ai/tasks.md` ‚Äî Active work
- `docs/ai/decisions.md` ‚Äî 13 ADRs
- `docs/ai/architecture.md` ‚Äî System design

## Key Files by Area

### Layout / Brand
- `app/layout.tsx` ‚Äî root layout + default OG + Twitter card
- `components/layout/Header.tsx` ‚Äî client component; mobile menu + desktop primary nav
- `components/layout/Footer.tsx` ‚Äî secondary nav + newsletter signup
- `app/globals.css` ‚Äî Tailwind v4 `@theme` + brand tokens
- `content/site.ts` ‚Äî name, address, partners (with tagline/services/IG/email), nav (`primary` flag)

### About + Vendors
- `app/about/page.tsx` ‚Äî story page with photo hero
- `app/vendors/page.tsx` ‚Äî directory: long-term partners + featured vendors
- `content/vendors.ts` ‚Äî typed Vendor[] (currently: Pure-trition)
- `components/vendors/VendorCard.tsx`
- `app/vendors/apply/*` ‚Äî application form

### Supabase + Auth
- `lib/supabase/{server,browser,admin,public}.ts` ‚Äî 4 clients by use case
- `lib/supabase/types.ts` ‚Äî hand-written Database (incl. 0002 flair columns)
- `lib/auth.ts` ‚Äî role helpers
- `middleware.ts` ‚Äî session refresh + /admin /account gating
- `supabase/migrations/0001_init.sql` + `0002_event_flair.sql` + `seed.sql`

### Events + RSVP + Featured flair
- `app/events/page.tsx`, `app/events/[slug]/page.tsx`, `app/events/[slug]/actions.ts`
- `components/events/{EventCard,BookingForm}.tsx`
- `lib/events.ts` ‚Äî incl. `formatPriceCents`
- `lib/validations/booking.ts`
- Featured fields: `tagline`, `price_cents`, `themes`, `included_perks`, `is_featured`

### Event Photos
- `lib/gallery.ts` ‚Äî `listPhotosForEvent(eventId)` powers the "From the day" grid on event detail

### Produce (Google Sheets)
- `lib/sheets.ts` + `app/shop/**` + `components/produce/*`

### Recipes
- `app/recipes/**` + `lib/recipes.ts` + `content/recipes/*.mdx`

### History
- `app/history/**` + `lib/mdx.ts` + `content/history/*.mdx`

### Forms (Newsletter / Vendor / Contact)
- `components/marketing/NewsletterSignup.tsx`
- `app/actions/newsletter.ts` + `app/api/newsletter/confirm/route.ts`
- `app/vendors/apply/*`, `app/contact/*`
- `lib/validations/*`
- `components/forms/fields.tsx` ‚Äî shared primitives

### Gallery
- `app/gallery/page.tsx`
- `lib/gallery.ts` ‚Äî local /public or Supabase Storage path resolution

### Admin
- `app/admin/layout.tsx` (role gate) + dashboard + 4 list views
- `components/admin/DataTable.tsx`

### Weather
- `lib/weather.ts` + `app/weather/page.tsx` + `components/weather/WeatherWidget.tsx`

### Email
- `lib/resend.ts` ‚Äî wrapHtml + sendEmail; soft no-op when RESEND_API_KEY missing

## Common Tasks

**To add a history article:** create `content/history/your-slug.mdx` with frontmatter. Auto-appears at `/history` + `/history/your-slug`.

**To add a recipe:** create `content/recipes/your-slug.mdx` with `ingredients` (array). Shop items whose name matches any ingredient cross-link to it.

**To add an event:** use the admin UI at `/admin/events ‚Üí New event` (create/edit/delete + attendees + CSV). Drafts stay off the public site until `status=published`. (Direct `events` table inserts still work but the UI is the intended path.)

**To add an admin:** `/admin/team ‚Üí Add an admin` (invite-only) ‚Äî creates a full-admin account with a temp password. Or add the email to `ADMIN_EMAIL_ALLOWLIST` in Vercel for a "root" admin. New admins get `profiles.role='admin'`; they change their temp password at `/admin/password`.

**To add a vendor to the directory:** append to `featuredVendors` in `content/vendors.ts`. Long-term partners go in `site.partners` in `content/site.ts`.

**To link photos to an event:** insert rows into `gallery_photos` with `event_id = (select id from events where slug = '‚Ä¶')`. The event detail page picks them up automatically.

**To grow the produce catalog:** edit the Google Sheet ‚Äî that's it. Site reflects within 15 min.

**To change brand tokens:** edit `:root` and `@theme inline` in `app/globals.css`. Token names referenced as Tailwind classes repo-wide.

**To grant admin to a user:** add their email to `ADMIN_EMAIL_ALLOWLIST` (`.env.local` + Vercel). Role conferred at next sign-in.

**To run locally:** `npm install`, copy `.env.example` to `.env.local`, fill keys, `npm run dev`.

**To deploy:** merge `perry-v2 ‚Üí main`. Vercel auto-deploys. Env vars must be set in Vercel project.

## Required Image Files (save to disk before deploy)

- `public/brand/flyer_soothing_sundays.jpg` ‚Äî Soothing Sundays event flyer
- `public/gallery/grand-opening-class.jpg` ‚Äî About page hero + Grand Opening photos
- `public/gallery/grand-opening-vendors-tents.jpg` ‚Äî default OG image + Grand Opening photos
- `public/gallery/grand-opening-vendors-row.jpg` ‚Äî Grand Opening photos + /vendors OG
- `public/gallery/grand-opening-pure-trition.jpg` ‚Äî Pure-trition vendor card

## Environment Variables

### Required for MVP
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`
- `ADMIN_EMAIL_ALLOWLIST` ‚Äî comma-separated admin emails
- `OPENWEATHER_API_KEY`

### Optional (graceful degrade)
- `RESEND_API_KEY` (+ optional `RESEND_FROM`)
- `CONTACT_TO_EMAIL`
- `GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID`, `GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON`
- `WEATHER_LAT`, `WEATHER_LON`, `WEATHER_UNITS`

### Phase 2 (when ready)
- `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY`, `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`

`.env.local` is gitignored. `.env.example` is committed and documents everything.

## Git Workflow

- `main` ‚Äî production; Vercel auto-deploys to https://rootedlegacyfarm.com
- Cut a **fresh feature branch off `origin/main`** for each change; open a PR that **squash-merges** into `main`
- **Never merge `main` back** into a feature branch, and don't keep a long-lived working branch ‚Äî that dropped committed work twice (the old `perry-v2` was deleted for this reason)
